title: SemanticWaypointArray
description: Wire format for the JSON output of waypoint_publisher_node (output_format='json'). Stable as of v1.

path.description: Ordered list of node ids visited by the planner.

waypoints.description: Ordered list of semantic waypoints, one per node in path.

node_id.description: Identifier of the node this waypoint was derived from.

node_type.description: Semantic type of the node (e.g. room, corridor, elevator). Free-form — not enumerated to keep custom domains workable.

action.description: Categorical action the executor should perform at this waypoint. The built-in vocabulary is listed in enum; downstream consumers SHOULD accept additional values for forward compatibility.

instruction.description: Single-sentence human-readable instruction for this waypoint.

pose.description: Optional 2D pose. Absent when the source node has no pose.

properties.description: Arbitrary string-keyed properties copied verbatim from the source node. Values may be any JSON type.
